Description:
Onboarding to a new project can take hours of reading code, but it doesn't have to. With GitHub Copilot CLI, you can simply ask for an overview, and it will scan the repository to give you a plain English breakdown. Stop digging through folders and let AI do the heavy lifting for you.

Watch our full Copilot CLI for beginners series to learn more time-saving terminal tricks: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BDxRhhs36ns&list=PL0lo9MOBetEHvO-spzKBAITkkTqv4RvNl

#GitHubCopilot #CopilotCLI #GitHub

Stay up-to-date on all things GitHub by connecting with us:

YouTube: https://gh.io/subgithub Blog: https://github.blog X: https://twitter.com/github LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/company/github Insider newsletter: https://resources.github.com/newsletter/ Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/github TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@github

About GitHub It’s where over 180 million developers create, share, and ship the best code possible. It’s a place for anyone, from anywhere, to build anything—it’s where the world builds software. https://github.com
Author: GitHub
Title: How to understand any codebase in seconds
